# Rasmus Thunborg

> Software Architect in Gothenburg, Sweden, focused on backend systems, cloud architecture, technical leadership, integrations, legacy modernization, and Agentic AI.

## Overview

This is the personal website and CV profile for Rasmus Thunborg.

- Website: [thunborg.se](https://thunborg.se)
- Location: Gothenburg, Sweden
- Languages: Swedish and English
- LinkedIn: [linkedin.com/in/rthunborg](https://www.linkedin.com/in/rthunborg/)

## Profile

Rasmus combines traditional software engineering with Agentic AI. His background is strongest in backend development with .NET and C#, but includes TypeScript, React, Tailwind, cloud architecture, CI/CD, infrastructure as code, technical analysis, and team leadership.

## Main Areas

- Software architecture and system design
- Backend development with .NET, C#, APIs, and integrations
- Azure, AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, and CI/CD
- Microservices, event sourcing, domain-driven design, and legacy modernization
- Technical leadership, mentoring, and architecture decision-making
- Agentic AI, MCP, A2A, prompt engineering, and LLM application security

## Selected Work

- **Nordic shipping / HR operations:** Real-time platform replacing Excel-based seasonal recruitment workflows.
- **Nordic HR group:** Automated credential rotation pipeline using AWS Lambda and GitHub Actions.
- **Global EV manufacturer:** Technical leadership for financial integrations on AWS serverless.
- **Nordic fashion chain:** Legacy-to-event-driven architecture modernization with .NET, Azure, Kubernetes, and event sourcing.
- **Global furniture group:** .NET backend architecture for internal 3D modeling, IAM, CI/CD, and legacy migration.

All selected work: [Selected Projects](https://thunborg.se/case-studies)

## Contact

Use the contact form on the website or email [rasmus@thunborg.se](mailto:rasmus@thunborg.se).
